title: Lead Agentic AI Engineer
company_focus: Water, hygiene and energy technologies and services
description:
Job Characteristics: Own the architecture and delivery of
GenAI-based systems that integrate large language models
(LLMs), multi-agent workflows, and embedding-powered
retrieval solutions. Guide cross-functional pods, define
engineering standards, and drive innovation through
scalable, production-grade intelligent applications. You
will lead a team of associates both functionally and admin
responsibilites.

Education/Work Experience: Degree and 8-10 years experience.

Independence Level/Reports to: Normally reports to AI
Engineering Manager.
responsibilities: Own the architecture and delivery of GenAI-based systems
Integrate large language models (LLMs) into production applications
Guide cross-functional pods and define engineering standards
Lead a team of associates with functional and administrative responsibilities
Drive innovation through scalable, production-grade intelligent applications
use_cases: Large language model integration and deployment
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building and deploying GenAI
systems including LLMs, multi-agent workflows, and RAG
solutions. The position requires hands-on architecture and
delivery of production-grade AI applications with agentic
capabilities.
